title: castilleja longiflora
intro: Castilleja longiflora, also known as Painted Cup or Indian Paintbrush, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and reducing fever. The health benefits of Castilleja longiflora include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Castilleja longiflora can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to soothe colds, flu, and other illnesses.
